headline: How This Chipmaker Turned Its Nvidia-Tied Fracas Into A Comeback Story
summary: Monolithic Power Systems stock is in the middle of a massive comeback, after it risked losing much of its Nvidia business last year.

raw.headline: How This Chipmaker Turned Its Nvidia-Tied Fracas Into A Comeback Story
raw.summary: Monolithic Power Systems stock is in the middle of a massive comeback, after it risked losing much of its Nvidia business last year.

headline: Is Bloom Energy Setting Up For Its Next Move?
summary: Once a stock has an explosive breakout and becomes extended, it may digest at the new level and form a fresh base.  IBD 50 names Bloom Energy, Vita Coco, Monolithic Power Systems and Comfort Systems all had rapid run-ups after breaking out of bases.  The guideline states that if a stock shoots up 20% or more within three weeks of breaking out of a proper base, it should be held for a potentially larger gain.
